Happy Death Day (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $55,683,845Details
International Box Office $69,326,415
Worldwide Box Office $125,010,260
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,216,448
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,578,029
Total $4,794,477
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A college student relives the day of her murder with both its unexceptional details and terrifying end until she discovers her killer’s identity.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$26,039,025 (46.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.14 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:44.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$5,000,000 (worldwide box office is 25.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,149 opening theaters/3,535 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $74,245,133

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 13th, 2017 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: October 11th, 2017 (Wide) (South Korea)
October 13th, 2017 (Wide) (Brazil)
October 13th, 2017 (Wide) (Venezuela)
October 13th, 2017 (Wide) (Mongolia)
October 13th, 2017 (Wide) (Estonia)
Video Release: January 2nd, 2018 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence/terror, crude sexual content, language, some drug material and partial nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2486 (Cert #51049), 7/26/2017)
Running Time: 96 minutes
Franchise: Happy Death Day
Cast, crew, or production detail: Development Hell, One Day
Plot point: Alternate or Altered Realities, Murder Mystery, Time Travel
Social setting: College
Subgenre: Horror Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Blumhouse, Universal Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
